result.reasoning: Multi-modal single-cell study of cultured CD8 T cells from PBMC using 10x Chromium 5' chemistry with CITE-seq (GEX + ADT + HTO) and TCR VDJ profiling across three donor conditions (Ci10004, Ci10074, Ci10076).
